hero.location: A local teppan izakaya in Okawa, Ishigaki
hero.title: Make your Ishigaki night taste better.
hero.subtitle: Slow down with teppan dishes, drinks, and the easy rhythm of a local island night.
hero.imageAlt: A warm teppan izakaya glowing at night in Ishigaki

about.title: Local enough to feel real, welcoming enough for travelers.
about.description: Teppan Izakaya Wazaogi is a local hideaway a short walk from central Ishigaki. It is loved by locals, repeat visitors, and people who work late in the restaurant scene. Open until late, it works just as well for dinner as it does for a second stop after drinks.
about.imageAlt: A cozy teppan izakaya interior with steam and warm lighting
about.badgeText: A local teppan spot for late nights

local.title: Local Feel
local.text: Casual, warm, and comfortable without feeling made for tourists.

travel.title: Traveler Friendly
travel.text: Easy to step into even on your first night in Ishigaki.

warm.title: Teppan Heat
warm.text: The sound and aroma from the hot plate make the drinks taste better.

menu.title: Local favorites for a proper Ishigaki night.
menu.description: From signature sticky nori rolls and Ishigaki beef to fresh sashimi, sea grapes, and island awamori.

items.name: Sticky Nori Roll
items.description: A popular roll with grated yam and other sticky ingredients wrapped in nori.

items.name: Teppan Grilled Meat
items.description: Juicy meat cooked boldly on the hot plate with a deep, savory aroma.

items.name: Ishigaki Wagyu Beef
items.description: Premium Ishigaki wagyu on the teppan. Rich, buttery, and deeply satisfying.

items.name: Island Fish Sashimi
items.description: Fresh catch from the waters around Ishigaki. Best paired with cold awamori.

items.name: Sea Grapes
items.description: Okinawa's ocean treasure with a satisfying pop. Light, refreshing, and easy to snack on.

items.name: Teppan Vegetables
items.description: Simple grilled vegetables that bring out the natural sweetness of the ingredients.

items.name: Ishigaki Awamori
items.description: Local awamori from an Ishigaki distillery. On the rocks, with water, or sparkling.

items.name: Drinks
items.description: Beer, sours, cocktails, and more. Great for dinner or a late-night stop.

gallery.title: Close to the lantern light, the grill, and the local night.
gallery.description: Counter seats, tables, tatami room, and the cooking scene. Small, warm, and easy to settle into.

items.title: Counter Seats
items.description: A comfortable place for solo diners and small groups near the sound of the grill.

items.title: Table Seats
items.description: Easygoing seats for friends, couples, and casual family meals.

items.title: Dining Room
items.description: Wood textures, warm lighting, and lanterns create a real local izakaya mood.

items.title: Tatami Room
items.description: Relax on the floor in the tatami room — ideal for groups looking for a cozy, slow evening.

items.title: Teppan Cooking
items.description: The steam, sound, and aroma from the hot plate pull you into the night.

features.title: Why it feels easy to visit.
features.description: Practical details that make the restaurant useful for travelers and locals alike.

items.title: Open until 1 AM
items.text: Good for dinner, late drinks, or a second stop after the main event.

items.title: Open Every Day
items.text: No regular holidays. Easy to fit into any travel itinerary.

items.title: Cards Accepted
items.text: Convenient for travelers who prefer cashless payment.

items.title: 4-5 Min Walk
items.text: A short walk from the 730 intersection and the main bus terminal.

items.title: Local Favorite
items.text: A hideaway loved by locals and repeat visitors to Ishigaki.

reviews.title: The kind of place that feels like a good find.
reviews.description: Less like a tourist set piece, more like a real Ishigaki night.

items.quote: Locals were eating here, so we knew it had to be good. We'll definitely be back next time.
items.name: Traveler in Ishigaki

items.quote: We came for a second stop and ended up staying much longer than planned.
items.name: Repeat guest

items.quote: The grill aroma, awamori, and Ishigaki beef made the night unforgettable.
items.name: Visiting guests

instagram.title: Tonight at Wazaogi
instagram.description: Food, the room, and Ishigaki nights. Follow Instagram for the latest updates.

posts.title: Tonight's teppan grill
posts.text: The sound, steam, and aroma of tonight's recommendation.

posts.title: Healthy sticky nori roll
posts.text: A local favorite that is light, satisfying, and great with awamori.

posts.title: Inside the shop
posts.text: Lantern light, wood textures, and a room that feels easy to enter.

posts.title: Local favorite menu
posts.text: Start with the teppan dishes if you want to join the local night.

posts.title: Ishigaki night
posts.text: A warm light waiting just off the main streets.

cta.title: Take a look at tonight's Wazaogi
cta.description: Daily specials and opening updates are posted on Instagram.

access.title: A short walk from the center, perfect for finding at night.
access.description: Located about 4-5 minutes on foot from the 730 intersection and bus terminal.
access.name: Restaurant

reservation.title: Reserve your Ishigaki night
reservation.description: Seats are limited. Book through LINE, Tabelog, or Hot Pepper using whichever is easiest for you.
reservation.mascotNote: Our little mascot is waiting for tonight's toast, too.

line.title: LINE Booking
line.text: A quick way to check availability and make a reservation.

tabelog.title: Tabelog
tabelog.text: Check reviews and restaurant details before booking.

hotpepper.title: Hot Pepper
hotpepper.text: Useful for points, coupons, and easy online reservations.

footer.lead: Ishigaki night air, the heat of the teppan grill, and a drink among locals. A late-night teppan izakaya with a real island feel.
